data.title: Morgan Stanley's PE arm acquires majority stake in Olsson, Inc., an engineering firm with 2,000 employees and 35 offices.
data.description: Morgan Stanley's middle-market private equity arm has recently secured a majority investment deal with Olsson, Inc., an engineering firm. Morgan Stanley Capital Partners, a division of Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS), will be taking a majority stake in Olsson, which is a well-known employee-owned engineering and design company. As part of the agreement, Olsson employees will also be making a significant reinvestment, highlighting their collective commitment to the future growth of the firm. Established in 1956 in Lincoln, Nebraska, Olsson currently has over 2,000 employees spread across 35 offices throughout the United States. The company specializes in providing engineering design services, and this partnership is aimed towards enhancing its business prospects.

data.title: FDA finds no clear link between GLP-1 RAs and suicidal thoughts, but continues review due to limited data. Eli Lilly & Co. and Novo Nordisk drugs under scrutiny.
data.description: The FDA stated that a preliminary review has not shown evidence linking GLP-1 receptor agonists to suicidal thoughts or actions. Current prescribing information for GLP-1 drugs, like Eli Lilly's (LLY) and Novo Nordisk's (NVO), already includes warnings about these risks. The FDA is further investigating due to limited data and the seriousness of the issue. The agency reviewed reports from the FDA Adverse Event Reporting System regarding this matter. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Online training course on Supplier and Contract Manufacturer Management offered by ResearchAndMarkets.com on Feb 18-19, 2026; focuses on enhancing skills in supplier relationship management.
data.description: The training course "Supplier and Contract Manufacturer Management: Compliance, Qualification & Oversight" will take place from February 18th to February 19th, 2026. Hosted in Dublin, this program aims to improve participants' abilities in overseeing supplier relationships. It covers various aspects from supplier selection and approval to nurturing partnerships, risk evaluation, ongoing monitoring, and termination strategies. Interested individuals can find this offering on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

data.title: Sylvan Learning is ranked 98 on Entrepreneur's Franchise 500® List for franchise performance, investing in system, with continued growth.
data.description: Sylvan Learning, a top supplemental education provider, was recently acknowledged for its stellar franchise performance, significant system investment, and ongoing expansion efforts. As of January 13, 2026, the company continues to lead the way in offering enriching educational experiences for K-12 students. Sylvan Learning's commitment to quality education is highlighted through its continuous growth and dedication to providing top-notch services.

data.title: Inventor creates Saving Lives Shield (TKI-1259) in response to mass shootings worldwide, targeting various locations.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, a new innovative product called the Saving Lives Shield was unveiled. The inventor was inspired to create this product after witnessing numerous mass shootings occurring globally in various locations such as schools, churches, hospitals, military bases, and malls. The inventor expressed a strong motivation to mitigate the impact of such tragic events. The shield aims to enhance safety and potentially save lives in the event of an active shooter situation. This invention is a proactive measure intended to prevent harm, with the inventor emphasizing the importance of even potentially saving just one individual or more from such incidents.

data.title: Milestone Environmental acquires Striker Slurry Injection Facility, solidifying Permian Basin leadership. Expansion in NM.
data.description: Milestone Environmental, a renowned environmental infrastructure and waste management company, solidified its presence in the northern Delaware Basin by strategically expanding in New Mexico. The expansion, announced on January 13, 2026, highlights the company's commitment to growth and innovation. Based in Houston and Midland, Texas, Milestone's move is expected to significantly impact operations in the region.

data.title: Sierra Club cabins in Tahoe available on Hipcamp; 6 cabins open for booking, partnership announced.
data.description: In San Francisco, an announcement was made about Hipcamp and the Sierra Club teaming up to promote six historic Tahoe huts and cabins. This partnership aims to increase visibility and accessibility for these accommodations, making it easier for outdoor enthusiasts to find and reserve them. This initiative focuses on enhancing the experience of backcountry skiing in the area.

data.title: Hippocratic AI's GenAI sees rapid adoption with $126M Series C funding, valued at $3.5B, expanding in healthcare verticals.
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, a significant period of growth is underway across various healthcare industries following a successful Series C funding round. The company raised an impressive $126 million, leading to a valuation of $3.5 billion. This marks a transformative phase for the company, showcasing substantial progress and potential within the healthcare sector.

data.title: SEALSQ sees 66% revenue growth in FY25, eyes big 2026. Achieved $18M revenue with $8M in Q4 (vs. $4M last year).
data.description: SEALSQ Corp, traded as LAES on NASDAQ, saw a decline in its stock on Tuesday following the release of its FY25 preliminary results and FY26 guidance. The company reported revenue of $18 million for 2025, reflecting a 66% increase from the previous year. In the fourth quarter alone, SEALSQ generated $8 million in revenue, compared to $4 million in the same period in the previous year. This substantial growth in revenue was not enough to prevent a drop in LAES stock value as investors processed the information. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Jazz in the Gardens 2026 lineup grows with icons like Isley Brothers, Stephanie Mills, El DeBarge, Ludacris' 25th Anniversary Set, Nelly & Ashanti. March 7-8 festival in Miami Gardens.
data.description: The highly anticipated 2026 Jazz in the Gardens Music Festival, taking place on March 7-8 and hosted by the City of Miami Gardens, promises to be an electrifying event with iconic performances. The lineup features legendary artists such as The Isley Brothers, Stephanie Mills, and El DeBarge, alongside contemporary stars like Jhené Aiko and Ludacris celebrating his 25th anniversary. Additionally, a special performance by Nelly & Ashanti adds to the excitement. This music festival, produced by the Black Promoters Collective, is not to be missed.

data.title: PasswordManager.com survey: 2 in 3 Americans use predictable password patterns in 2026, incl. simple patterns, DOB, pet names.
data.description: A recent survey by PasswordManager.com, a leading authority on password security, reveals concerning trends in Americans' password habits. Despite ongoing warnings about cybersecurity risks, many individuals still use easily guessable passwords such as simple patterns, dates of birth, and pet names. The survey, released on January 13, 2026, highlights that a significant number of people are not taking adequate measures to protect their online accounts. This behavior underscores the urgent need for improved password practices to ensure greater internet safety.
